violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Wiping cloth used with raw animal food was not separated from use with non-raw animal wiping cloths. Bucket sanitizer concentrations too low. Test on a regular basis to ensure proper sanitizing concentrations are maintained.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Convection oven not located under hood system. Walls and ceiling discolored around oven.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need cleaning. Line cooking equipment needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counters under grills on cook line have an accumulation of grease and food debris and need cleaning. Reach in single door cooler on cook line has food debris and spills. Needs cleaning. Ladder racks and sheet trays in walk in cooler have food residue and are in need of cleaning. Lower level of restaurant has an accumulation of bakery dust and is in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in units, upper and lower levels, have an accumulation of debris and food. Need cleaning. Walls in lower level walk in cooler need cleaning from a recent drain line leak. Floor in kitchen needs cleaning under cooking equipment, shelving units, and coolers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
